steps: Log in to your Replicate account or sign up at https://replicate.com/signin
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g., 'production', 'development')
Copy the token immediately — it starts with 'r8_' and is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Replicate API token. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: A default API token is created automatically when you register
Tokens always start with 'r8_' and are 40 characters long
Token is shown only once — copy it before closing the dialog
You can create multiple tokens for different environments (dev/staging/prod)
Pay-as-you-go pricing — you are charged per prediction; no free tier for API usage
Disable compromised tokens from the same page without deleting them

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated account details to verify the token
